_comment: Favorites-only backtest/small-account config. SIZING (iter 47-48): bullet_pct 0.02->0.025 after an OOS sizing sweep (research_sizing.py) showed 2% was below the geometric-growth-optimal for a small account (geo-growth/mkt rises 0.29->0.41% as size goes 2->3%; arith Sharpe/mkt flat ~0.398 => classic below-Kelly under-betting, not leverage). TAIL-AWARE CHOICE: sized via the WORST-CASE Monte-Carlo ordering (not a single path) — across 2000 random orderings, worst-DD is 2.0%:17.2% / 2.5%:21.1% / 3.0%:24.7-25.2%. 3.0% rides/occasionally trips the 25% kill-switch; 2.5% keeps a buffer with 0 kills/2000 and ~4x the mean ROI of 2%. Kept fractional-Kelly (growth-optimal ~0.06+) for estimation-error safety — this bot blew up once from overconfidence. SCOPE: small-account effect ONLY; benefit collapses above ~$10k as thin-book caps bind (+2345pp@$1k -> +15pp@$100k), matching the $1-10k edge capacity. Raise toward 0.03 ONLY with explicit tolerance for a ~25% worst-case drawdown.
